Today we celebrate you

Happy 60th Birthday

Jila

With all my love, have an amazing day

✦ ✦ ✦

My love, I wish that I could have been there with you today. But since I can't, I made you this little corner to celebrate your birthday. I hope you'll feel my presence with you today in spirit.

I love you. You are the one person with whom I can be completely myself, and you are always there. That kind of love is rare, and I don't take a single day of it for granted.

Today is yours. And I have sixty things I need you to know.

All my love, always ✦
